response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A. No reference lyrics provided, as this is a Minecraft commentary video. 2. JSON Usage: The reference was used to confirm there is no vocal music. I manually transcribed and translated the spoken commentary from scratch. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the spoken phrases accurately to match the natural pauses and bursts of Ninomae Ina'nis' commentary.
